title: Content Developer- AI Media
description:
Job Summary

As an Content Devloper- AI Media Developer you are
responsible for generating engaging and innovative content
leveraging an state-of-the-art AI-driven platform. This role
requires a blend of creative and tech abilities to generate
and refine AI outputs with quality standards as per JioStar
guidelines track content performance.

Key Responsibilities

- Generate content with AI: Use inhouse media studio platform
  to produce original text, images, videos, and other
  assets.
- Responsible AI: Foundational understanding of the principles
  of Responsible AI, including concepts like fairness,
  transparency, and data privacy.
- Prompt engineering: Develop and refine specific prompts and
  instructions for AI tools to ensure the generated content
  is high-quality, relevant, and consistent with the brand's
  style.
- Edit and refine AI-generated content: Conduct human review
  and editing of AI drafts to enhance quality, add nuanced
  or creative elements, and ensure accuracy.
- Collaborate across teams: Work closely with marketers,
  designers, and subject-matter experts to align AI-assisted
  content with broader marketing goals and campaigns.
- Learning Agility: Proven ability to rapidly learn new
  technologies,platforms, and complex processes. Keep up-to-
  date with advancements in AI creative tools, best
  practices, and licensing policies.

Skills and Attributes for Success

- Basic experience in video production, with a portfolio
  showcasing your skills.
- Proficiency in using AI-based tools
- Understanding of overall video production.
- Excellent attention to detail and creativity
- Ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced environment
- Strong communication skills and openness to feedback

Preferred Education & Experience

- A Bachelor’s or Diploma background in Media, Design or
  related digital creative fields.
- Demonstrated experience producing long form videos (at least
  a minute long) using AI-based tools.
- Strong understanding of the overall video production
  lifecycle.

About Us

Perched firmly at the nucleus of spellbinding content and
innovative technology, JioStar is a leading global media &
entertainment company that is reimagining the way audiences
consume entertainment and sports. Its television network and
streaming service together reach more than 750 million
viewers every week, igniting the dreams and aspirations of
hundreds of million people across geographies.

JioStar is an equal opportunity employer. The company values
diversity and its mission is to create a workplace where
everyone can bring their authentic selves to work. The
company ensures that the work environment is free from any
discrimination against persons with disabilities, gender,
gender identity and any other characteristics or status that
is legally protected.
responsibilities: Generate content using in-house AI media studio platform to produce text, images, and videos
Apply Responsible AI principles including fairness, transparency, and data privacy in content generation
Develop and refine prompts for AI tools to ensure high-quality, brand-consistent content
Edit and enhance AI-generated content through human review and creative refinement
Collaborate with marketing, design, and subject-matter experts on campaign alignment
Stay updated on AI creative tools, best practices, and licensing policies
use_cases: AI-powered content generation for media and entertainment
Automated video and image production using AI tools
AI-assisted marketing and campaign content creation
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on work with AI tools for content
generation including prompt engineering, using AI-based
video production tools, and refining AI-generated outputs.
The employee works directly with AI systems to create text,
images, and videos rather than supporting infrastructure or
platforms for others.
